pi_items.source: Task description and export_result.sh explicitly specify this output path.
Task description explicitly mandates creating a 6-slide presentation.
Task description explicitly requests Title 'Hurricane Ian Emergency Briefing' and subtitle 'Coastal County EMA' on Slide 1.
Extracted from the synthetically modified nhc_advisory_22.txt which lists MAXIMUM SUSTAINED WINDS...155 MPH and PRESENT MOVEMENT...NNE.
Task description explicitly requests stating the expected peak surge (12-18 feet) on Slide 4.
Task description and county_response_plan.txt explicitly list mandatory evacuation zones A and B for Slide 5.
Task description and county_response_plan.txt explicitly list High School and Civic Center shelters for Slide 6.
Task description explicitly requires adding a speaker note mentioning sustained winds exceeding 45 mph on Slide 6.

privileged_info_summary: Completed PI audit for onlyoffice_env hurricane_evacuation_briefing task by confirming that the task operates on synthetic/modified data (a fabricated County Response Plan and an altered NHC Advisory 22 that blends data from real advisories 24 and 24A). Verified that all expected presentation terms, slide counts, output paths, and the exact speaker note threshold (45 mph) explicitly match the task description instructions and setup scripts.
